import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut has = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(byte)
      if byte == 32 or byte == 9 or byte == 10 or byte == 13
        if has
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
          has = false
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(byte)}"
        has = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_one() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_one()
  let line2 = read_one()
  let a = parse_ints(line1)
  let b = parse_ints(line2)
  let n = list.len(a)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match list.get(a, i)
    when Some(x)
      match list.get(b, i)
      when Some(y)
        println("#{x}+#{y}=#{x + y}")
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
end
